title: France into World Cup semi-final win over Morocco
subhed: Kylian Mbappé shrugged off an early penalty miss to score and set up another goal as France beat Morocco 2-0 on Thursday to book a place in the World Cup semi-finals.

title: 'In trying to avoid accusations of exaggerating, the IPCC has instead underestimated the severity of our summers'
subhed: Long accused of alarmism by the far right, the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) has, in fact, been too cautious, underestimating the speed of change and its impacts, says historian Jean-Baptiste Fressoz.

title: Kanye West, banned from most European countries, receives €4 million grant to perform in Albania
subhed: Barred from entering or performing due to antisemitic and neo-Nazi statements, the American rapper is set to take the stage on July 11 in Tirana. Many protesters are accusing Prime Minister Edi Rama of using the event to serve his own interests.

title: Does the decline in reading and the rise of screens signal the end of the democratic era?
subhed: While concerns about the weakening of the mind in the face of new technologies are nothing new, the digital revolution and artificial intelligence now point to a possible end of book civilization.

title: Somaliland's high-risk quest for recognition
subhed: The self-proclaimed republic aspires to accede to the international stage. It finds itself at the center of a game of alliances, caught between Israeli, American and Emirati ambitions and threats from Yemen and neighboring Somalia.

title: Pyrénées wildfires destroy everything in their path: 'I didn't think I'd make it out alive'
